filename_convention: Uses .htm extension per SEC EDGAR's 25+-year convention. Production input from EDGAR always ends in .htm; fixture matches so any extension-aware tooling behaves identically in tests and live.
note: Real EDGAR 10-K for LSCC, fiscal period FY2026, filed 2026-02-13. Public-domain SEC filing. Trimmed via scripts/build_chunking_fixture.py to fit the 500 KB pre-commit cap while preserving real section headers for Item 1A, Item 7, Item 8 in document order and at least one inline financial table for Item 8 table-policy tests.
